title: Popolate pulseId to forwarded Page after Form was submitted
excerpt: We would like to suggest to improve the integration process, by having any kind of identification of the form’s Id’s (pulseId, subscriptionId, etc) after the form was submitted and the process continues with a forward to…

posts.author: alex001 (alex001)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to suggest to improve the integration process, by having any kind of identification of the form’s Id’s (pulseId, subscriptionId, etc) after the form was submitted and the process continues with a forward to another site. On this site the the (pulseId, subscriptionId, etc) can be used to link to the correct data.
